chapter_title.en: Chapter on Kindness and Avoiding Deception in Sales

text: 3987 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "مَنْ غَشَّ اَلْمُسْلِمِينَ حُشِرَ مَعَ اَلْيَهُودِ يَوْمَ اَلْقِيَامَةِ لِأَنَّهُمْ أَغَشُّ اَلنَّاسِ لِلْمُسْلِمِينَ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.3987 - Imam (as) said: "Whoever deceives the Muslims will be resurrected with the Jews on the Day of Judgment, because they are the most deceitful people towards the Muslims."
